data.name: Magical Waifus Academy
data.detailed_description:
As an aspiring mage in 'Magical Waifu Academy', find yourself exploring mystical realms via a magical portal. By chance, you discover a spell leading to a world brimming with enchanting creatures seeking amusement. This lively RPG is rich with monstergirl encounters and enticing content, offering 26 unique characters and 14 vivid scenes for your scholarly pursuit.


Combat and Companionship with Monstergirls: Engage in battles against monstergirls, utilizing a blend of combat and seduction spells. Overcome challenges to either defeat or befriend them, adding to your adventure's dynamics.


Explore Dungeons: Venture through diverse, themed dungeons, encountering various monstergirls on each floor, and discovering both temporary and permanent power-ups to enhance your journey.


Interact with NPCs: Delve into the rich lore and quests provided by NPCs, with conversations leading to unique sex scenes, deepening the game's narrative and your connection to its world.


Level Up and Training: Progress your character by allocating experience points to stats or honing skills through interactive minigames, allowing for personalized development and growth.

data.short_description: Step into 'Magical Waifu Academy', a vibrant RPG where you, an aspiring mage, explore realms teeming with monstergirls. Master spells, engage in risqué encounters, and uncover 14 high-resolution scenes in a world where magic and allure blend seamlessly.
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 日文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or newer
  • 處理器: Dual Core
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 120 MB 可用空間
